name: sdd-lite
description: Lightweight medium-weight SDD track for internal/departmental apps: spec, single approval, implement, lite gate.

interface.shortDescription: Lightweight SDD track for internal apps
interface.longDescription: A medium-weight spec-driven flow for internal/departmental apps: generate requirements/design/tasks, a single human approval, implement, then a lightweight deterministic gate. Reuses the SDD anti-self-approval guard; graduates additively to full SDD.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the lite-spec skill to prepare a lightweight specification.
